meta.home.title: Intellica | Unleashing Value From Data
meta.home.description: Intellica empowers enterprises to generate sustainable value from data through modern data platforms, analytics solutions, and production-grade AI systems.
home.hero.label: Data & AI · Trusted Since 2006
home.hero.desc: We design and deliver enterprise data platforms that enable reliable analytics and production-ready AI.
home.proof.text: We help organizations move from fragmented data to measurable business outcomes — enabling faster decisions, better operations and scalable AI.
home.capabilities.label: Capabilities
home.capabilities.title: Enterprise Data &
home.capabilities.sub: From data platforms to enterprise AI applications — we design, build and operate scalable data ecosystems.
home.capabilities.card1.title: Modern Data Platforms & DWH
home.capabilities.card1.desc: We build scalable data platforms; managing architecture, cloud modernization and integration end-to-end.
home.capabilities.card2.title: BI & Advanced Analytics
home.capabilities.card2.desc: Transforming data into actionable insights with dashboards and self-service analytics for real-time decisions.
home.capabilities.card3.title: AI & Machine Learning
home.capabilities.card3.desc: Enhancing processes with GenAI/LLM and intelligent agents — demand forecasting and NLP analytics.
home.capabilities.card4.title: Data Governance & Products
home.capabilities.card4.desc: Ensuring data quality and consistency with ICC, ReTouch and industry-specific data models for standardized data.
home.capabilities.card5.title: Consulting & Expert Support
home.capabilities.card5.desc: Governance, GAP analysis and target roadmaps — plus expert team deployment and managed services.
home.globalImpact.label: Global Presence
home.globalImpact.title: Global Impact in Data &
home.globalImpact.sub: Turkey-based data and AI company delivering enterprise-grade solutions across 20+ countries with successful projects in banking, telecom, public sector and manufacturing.
home.globalImpact.metric1.label: Countries
home.globalImpact.metric1.desc: where Intellica has successfully delivered data and AI projects.
home.globalImpact.metric2.label: Projects
home.globalImpact.metric2.desc: delivered for global organizations across multiple industries.
home.globalImpact.metric3.label: Professionals
home.globalImpact.metric3.desc: including solution architects, data engineers and AI specialists.
home.globalImpact.metric4.label: Platforms
home.globalImpact.metric4.desc: covering modern DWH, lakehouse and cloud architectures.
home.trustedClients.label: Trusted By
home.trustedClients.title: Trusted by
home.trustedClients.sub: From banking to telecoms, insurance to government — selected enterprises we run data and AI projects with.
home.dwh.label: Enterprise Data Platforms
home.dwh.title: Enterprise
home.dwh.sub: Build modern data platforms that power analytics, AI and enterprise applications.
home.dwh.card1.title: DWH Modernization
home.dwh.card1.desc: Simplify your data warehouse, strengthen the layered architecture. Build scalable structures with cloud migration and cost/performance optimization.
home.dwh.card2.title: Data Integration & Operations
home.dwh.card2.desc: Build reliable data flows from source systems; ensure sustainable operations with data quality gates.
home.dwh.card3.title: Semantic Layer & BI Architecture
home.dwh.card3.desc: Standardize KPIs in a single truth layer, balance self-service with enterprise control.
home.products.label: Enterprise Products
home.products.title: Enterprise
home.products.sub: End-to-end product architecture — from industry data models to production-grade AI.
home.products.shelf1.title: Data
home.products.shelf1.desc: International industry standards for accelerated DWH transformation.
home.products.ifdm.title: IFDM
home.products.ifdm.desc: Standard data model for finance analytics.
home.products.itdm.title: ITDM
home.products.itdm.desc: Global data model for telecom intelligence.
home.products.hrdm.title: HRDM
home.products.hrdm.desc: Optimized model for HR & workforce analytics.
home.products.shelf2.title: Platform &
home.products.shelf2.desc: Ensuring data quality, consistency and sustainable orchestration.

home.products.retouch.title: ReTouch

home.products.orqenta.title: Orqenta
home.products.orqenta.desc: Workflow orchestration & distributed job scheduling platform.

home.products.shelf3.desc: Enterprise AI applications for analytics, automation and decision intelligence.

home.aiSolutions.label: AI PORTFOLIO
home.aiSolutions.title: Enterprise AI Solutions
home.aiSolutions.sub: Production-grade AI solutions designed to improve decisions, automate operations and unlock business value.
home.aiSolutions.card1.title: Customer Intelligence AI
home.aiSolutions.card1.desc: Natural language access to enterprise data through intelligent AI assistants.
home.aiSolutions.card2.title: Predictive Decisioning AI
home.aiSolutions.card2.desc: Forecasting, scoring and optimization models that improve decision-making.
home.aiSolutions.card3.title: Knowledge Automation
home.aiSolutions.card3.desc: AI-powered search, summarization and document intelligence for enterprise knowledge.
home.aiSolutions.card4.title: Operational & Agentic AI
home.aiSolutions.card4.desc: Autonomous AI systems that execute workflows and optimize operations in real time.
home.successStories.label: Real-World Impact
home.successStories.title: Selected
home.successStories.sub: From data consistency to AI-driven decision support, we help organizations solve real business problems with scalable data and AI solutions.
home.successStories.card1.desc: Improved data consistency across critical systems — reducing reconciliation effort and increasing reporting accuracy.
home.successStories.card2.desc: Enabled scalable data models and analytics — improving customer insights and operational efficiency.
home.successStories.card3.desc: Strengthened forecasting and visibility — enabling more accurate planning and better operational decisions.
home.whyIntellica.label: Why Intellica
home.whyIntellica.title: Why Organizations
home.whyIntellica.sub: We are not just a technology provider — we combine consulting, engineering, and products to deliver end-to-end data and AI transformation.
home.whyIntellica.card1.title: End-to-End Delivery
home.whyIntellica.card1.desc: From strategy to production — including data platforms, AI deployment and long-term operations.
home.whyIntellica.card2.title: Vendor-Agnostic Approach
home.whyIntellica.card2.desc: Proven across multiple enterprise technology stacks and cloud ecosystems.
home.whyIntellica.card3.title: Proven Enterprise Experience
home.whyIntellica.card3.desc: Experience across complex, large-scale environments where data reliability is critical.
home.howWeWork.label: Methodology
home.howWeWork.title: How We
home.howWeWork.sub: A structured approach to design, build, and operate enterprise data platforms.
home.howWeWork.step1.title: Discovery & GAP Analysis
home.howWeWork.step1.desc: Identify current state, risks and quick wins; define target KPIs.
home.howWeWork.step2.title: Target Architecture & Roadmap
home.howWeWork.step2.desc: Design platform, DWH, semantic layer and governance with phased transition plan.
home.howWeWork.step3.title: Implementation & Integration
home.howWeWork.step3.desc: Build pipelines, apply quality gates and observability with production standards.
home.howWeWork.step4.title: Go-Live & MLOps
home.howWeWork.step4.desc: Deploy AI solutions to production confidently — with versioning, monitoring and improvement cycles.
home.howWeWork.step5.title: Operations & Expert Support
home.howWeWork.step5.desc: Sustain SLA, maintenance, optimization and continuous improvement with our managed service model.
home.testimonials.label: Testimonials
home.testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
home.testimonials.sub: Feedback from enterprise-scale projects across different industries.
home.testimonials.t1.quote: Thanks to the technical assessment and roadmap work, we quickly identified the right modernization steps.
home.testimonials.t1.name: VP Data Platforms – Finance
home.testimonials.t2.quote: The architectural decisions and operational approach during migration enabled a seamless transition.
home.testimonials.t2.name: Analytics Lead – Telecom
home.testimonials.t3.quote: With the outsource team and managed service model, operational burden was significantly reduced.
home.testimonials.t3.name: IT Director – Retail

meta.about.title: About | Intellica
meta.about.description: Learn about Intellica — a Data & AI company founded in 2006, active in 20+ countries with 450+ Data & AI professionals.
about.schema.name: About Intellica
about.schema.description: Learn about Intellica — a Data & AI company founded in 2006, active in 20+ countries with 450+ Data & AI professionals.
about.hero.label: Data & AI · Trusted Since 2006
about.hero.title: About
about.hero.desc: A Data & AI company founded in 2006 — helping enterprises turn complex data into a strategic advantage, at scale.
about.whoWeAre.label: Global Presence
about.whoWeAre.title: Empowering Enterprises Through
about.whoWeAre.desc1: Intellica is a global Data & AI company with nearly two decades of experience. Since 2006, we've helped enterprises transform raw data into a powerful strategic asset — and we've been at the forefront of how that work has evolved.
about.whoWeAre.desc2: Our team of 100+ specialists — solution architects, data engineers, and AI practitioners — delivers end-to-end solutions across 20+ countries, from data platform engineering to production-grade agentic AI systems.
about.whoWeAre.stat1.label: Countries where Intellica has delivered Data & AI projects.
about.whoWeAre.stat2.label: Enterprise Data & AI projects delivered across industries worldwide.
about.whoWeAre.stat3.label: Data & AI professionals — architects, engineers, and AI specialists.
about.whoWeAre.stat4.label: Enterprise data platforms built — modern DWH, lakehouse, and cloud architectures.
about.capabilities.label: Expertise
about.capabilities.title: Core
about.capabilities.desc: We bridge the gap between complex data infrastructure and real business outcomes. Our work is results-driven: absolute data consistency, and AI that actually works in production.
about.capabilities.card1.title: Data Platform
about.capabilities.card1.desc: Lakehouse modernisation, DWH design, and high-performance data integration.
about.capabilities.card2.title: AI & agents
about.capabilities.card2.desc: Production-grade LLMs, RAG applications, and multi-agent autonomous systems.
about.capabilities.card3.title: Governance
about.capabilities.card3.desc: Data consistency monitoring, quality gates, and automated reconciliation.
about.capabilities.card4.title: Scale
about.capabilities.card4.desc: Supporting massive telemetry and high-concurrency analytical workloads.
about.howWeWork.title: How We
about.howWeWork.step1.title: Understand
about.howWeWork.step1.desc: We start by understanding your business, data landscape, and key challenges.
about.howWeWork.step2.title: Design
about.howWeWork.step2.desc: We design scalable data architectures and AI solutions aligned with your goals.
about.howWeWork.step3.title: Deliver
about.howWeWork.step3.desc: We implement, optimize, and continuously improve solutions in production.
about.values.label: Our Values
about.values.title: What
about.values.sub: The principles that guide how we work — and shape who we are.
about.values.card1.title: Measurable Impact
about.values.card1.desc: We measure success by real business outcomes — not deliverables or effort.
about.values.card2.title: Technical Excellence
about.values.card2.desc: Deep technical knowledge combined with industry experience — built to solve real problems in production.
about.values.card3.title: Long-term Partnership
about.values.card3.desc: We build lasting relationships. Our commitment to clients extends well beyond go-live.
about.values.card4.title: Innovation Culture
about.values.card4.desc: Continuous investment in R&D, proprietary products, and emerging technologies keeps us ahead of the curve.
about.history.label: Our Journey
about.history.title: Company
about.history.sub: Nearly two decades of milestones — from a two-person founding to a global Data & AI firm.
about.history.2006.title: Intellica Foundation
about.history.2006.desc: Dr. Kemal Unaltuna and Can Alhas
about.history.2009.title: EVAM
about.history.2011.title: Zagrebacka Bank
about.history.2011.desc: First major international project — Zagrebacka Bank, Croatia
about.history.2012.title: Organizational
about.history.2014.title: Zain Group
about.history.2014.desc: International expansion into telecoms — Zain Group projects
about.history.2015a.title: EVAM A.Ş.
about.history.2015b.title: ITDM
about.history.2016.title: Merger with PiA
about.history.2016.desc: Merger with PiA, R&D centre established — 80 employees
about.history.2019.title: IFDM — ICC
about.history.2020.title: Retouch
about.history.2021.title: UK Foundation
about.history.2022.title: Blue Octopus
about.history.2022.desc: Security data projects with Ministry of Interior
about.history.2023.title: 100+ Employee
about.history.2025.title: AI

about.clients.title: Trusted by
about.clients.desc: We work with 100+ enterprise organisations across banking, telecoms, and manufacturing — delivering measurable Data & AI outcomes.

meta.products.title: Products | Intellica
meta.products.description: Explore Intellica's Enterprise Product Portfolio — industry data models, data governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.schema.name: Intellica Enterprise Product Portfolio
productsPage.schema.description: Enterprise Product Portfolio — industry data models, data governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.hero.label: ENTERPRISE PRODUCT PORTFOLIO
productsPage.hero.title: Our
productsPage.hero.desc: End-to-end product architecture spanning industry data models, governance platforms, and AI-powered tools.
productsPage.dataModels.label: 01 · Data Models
productsPage.dataModels.title: Industry
productsPage.dataModels.sub: Licensed, pre-built data warehouse models designed for specific industry verticals — accelerating your data platform delivery.
productsPage.ifdm.desc: International standard data warehouse model for the finance industry. Pre-modeled with regulatory reporting, risk, CRM and more — ready to deploy.
productsPage.itdm.desc: Industry-specific data warehouse model for telecom operators. Network, billing, CRM dimensioning — pre-built and tested globally.
productsPage.hrdm.desc: Optimized data warehouse model for HR processes — workforce analytics, payroll, talent management ready from day one.
productsPage.governance.label: 02 · Data Platform & Governance
productsPage.governance.title: Platform &
productsPage.governance.sub: Enterprise-grade tools for data consistency, quality, entry management and no-code application development.
productsPage.icc.desc: Central data consistency management platform. Define reconciliation rules, monitor quality gates, and get automated alerts on data drift.
productsPage.retouch.desc: Validate, cleanse and import external data into your core systems with approval workflows, audit trails and version control.
productsPage.retable.desc: Build flexible apps and data tables without code. Collaborative, cloud-based platform with automations, integrations and AI capabilities.
productsPage.orqenta.desc: High-reliability platform for workflow orchestration and distributed job scheduling. Orchestrate complex data pipelines with precision, automation and full control.
productsPage.ai.label: 03 · AI Products
productsPage.ai.title: Enterprise
productsPage.ai.sub: Enterprise AI applications for analytics, automation and decision intelligence.
productsPage.talkto.desc: Ask your enterprise data questions in natural language. Get instant SQL queries, visualizations and insights — completely governed and auditable.
productsPage.blueoctopus.desc: Detect, analyze and manage critical business events in real time with AI-powered event intelligence and automated response across systems.
productsPage.var.desc: AI-powered voice signature creation, speaker matching and identity extraction. Built for security, call center and compliance use cases.
productsPage.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your
productsPage.cta.desc: From data platforms to AI solutions, we help organizations turn data into measurable business value.
productsDetail.ctaDesc: Schedule a personalized demo with our experts.
productsDetail.ifdm.desc: International standard data warehouse model for the finance industry. Pre-modeled with regulatory reporting, risk, CRM and more — ready to deploy.
productsDetail.itdm.desc: Industry-specific data warehouse model for telecom operators. Network, billing, CRM dimensioning — pre-built and tested globally.
productsDetail.hrdm.desc: Optimized data warehouse model for HR processes — workforce analytics, payroll, talent management ready from day one.
productsDetail.icc.desc: Central data consistency management platform. Define reconciliation rules, monitor quality gates, and get automated alerts on data drift.
productsDetail.retouch.desc: Validate, cleanse and import external data into your core systems with approval workflows, audit trails and version control.
productsDetail.retable.desc: Build flexible apps and data tables without code. Collaborative, cloud-based platform with automations, integrations and AI capabilities.
productsDetail.talkto.desc: Ask your enterprise data questions in natural language. Get instant SQL queries, visualizations and insights — completely governed and auditable.
productsDetail.blueoctopus.desc: Monitor critical data from a single center with AI-powered analytics. Event detection, alerting and action management across systems.
productsDetail.var.desc: AI-powered voice signature creation, speaker matching and identity extraction. Built for security, call center and compliance use cases.
